name: codbash-app
description: Dashboard + CLI for AI coding agents — Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, Kiro. View, search, resume, convert, sync sessions.
author: Valerii Kovalskii
comment:optionalDependencies: Browser terminal (Workspace) only. @lydell/node-pty ships prebuilt binaries and never invokes node-gyp; if no prebuilt exists for the platform it is simply skipped and the dashboard still runs — the terminal feature stays disabled with a friendly notice. The core dashboard remains dependency-free.
